risks.title: FOX Sports' Presentation of FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Etches Place in Record Books as Most-Watched Soccer Telecast in U.S. History With 38,937,000 Viewers

risks.title: ‘Right champions, but 2026 World Cup lost credibility’ — Ex-FIFA president Blatter
risks.description:
"The longest World Cup has come to an end – with the right champions. But on the way to the final whistle, the tournament had lost its credibility," Blatter wrote.
